MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar as moot in light of Plaintiff's dismissal of the entire action with prejudice on March 27, 2013.
